text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Listen, listen, listen!! I was just walking down 
the cobblestone path with all the trees, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, suddenly I heard this noise coming 
from the trees! And guess what?! 
Go on, guess!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I forgot while I was running here to tell you! 
Ahahahaha!
